data.title: Poland Parliament falls 20 votes short in overriding crypto bill veto for second time, remaining the sole EU state lacking MiCA implementation.
data.description: Polish legislators were unable to secure enough votes to override President Nawrocki's veto by a margin of 20 votes. As a result, Poland remains the sole European Union member state without the implementation of the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulations.

data.title: Fetch.AI aiming for $0.28 target with $0.24 resistance test. Break above predicts bullish reversal, failure could push down to $0.19 support.
data.description: Fetch.ai is currently facing a crucial challenge at the resistance level of $0.24, while experiencing negative funding rates that are creating squeeze conditions. If it manages to break above this resistance, the next target is set at $0.28. However, if it fails to do so, it could potentially drop to the support level of $0.19.

data.title: Caterpillar, Nvidia Chipmaker Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points
data.description: Two prominent companies, Caterpillar and Taiwan Semiconductor, are considered leading AI stocks. As the market continues to see substantial growth, these companies are among the top five stocks to keep an eye on for potential buy opportunities. This report highlights the strong performance and potential of Caterpillar and Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor, along with three other notable stocks nearing optimal buy points. The companies are poised for significant market activity and investment interest amid the current market conditions.

data.title: LTC price forecast: Smart money bulls 76% long, eyeing $62 as retail interest rises to 71%. $54-55 floor intact.
data.description: As institutional investors increase their long positions by 76% and retail investors follow at 71%, the momentum indicators for Litecoin (LTC) remain stagnant. Despite this, LTC is steadily moving towards breaking the $62 resistance level. The price has been supported by a solid floor around the $54-55 range for three consecutive periods.

data.title: AAVE aims for $125 breakout as whales bulk up during retail panic. Drop to $111 triggering capitulation. Bulls need $116 for $125 in 2 weeks.
data.description: A recent drop of 4.6% in AAVE's value down to $111 sparked a classic reaction from retail investors who began to capitulate. At the same time, larger investors (whales) took advantage of the situation to position themselves for a potential increase in value. The current market setup suggests that if the bulls are able to surpass the $116 resistance level, there is a possibility of AAVE reaching $125 within the next two weeks.

data.title: OpenAI's latest model, GPT-Rosalind, may accelerate drug discovery significantly, yet it's not accessible to all users.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced GPT-Rosalind, its inaugural domain-specific model tailored for drug discovery and life sciences. This unique model has been designed for specialized applications and is not intended for general use.

data.title: ALICE predicted to hit $0.27 in 48 hours or drop to $0.12. RSI at 86.30, 55% above averages. Likely resistance at $0.27 or breakout to $0.34.
data.description: ALICE's Relative Strength Index (RSI) is currently at 86.30, indicating a highly overbought situation. The price of ALICE is trading significantly above all moving averages, with a 55% difference. The stock is facing a key resistance level at $0.27, with a 70% chance of experiencing a strong pullback from this point. Alternatively, there is a possibility of a momentum-driven breakout leading to a target price of $0.34.

data.title: $0.02 Dead Cat Bounce now bullish, eyeing $0.035. 41% intraday surge hints at accumulation. Run to resistance in 10 days.
data.description: The recent surge in AUDIO's value saw a significant rebound from a support level of $0.02, indicating a potential upward movement towards a resistance point of $0.035 in the next 10 days. This increase represents a substantial 41% intraday range, suggesting that the market activity is centered around accumulation rather than distribution of assets.

data.title: LINK's price at $9.38 is nearing $10 resistance, crucial for a breakout in the next 72 hours or a retest at $8.50. Retail traders are bullish.
data.description: Trading at $9.38, LINK is currently encountering strong resistance at the $10 mark, as retail traders have predominantly adopted long positions. The course of action over the next three days will be crucial in determining whether there will be a surge past this resistance level or a potential retreat towards the range of $8.50 to $9.00.

data.title: AVAX surges to $9.80 with 72% whale support, aiming for $9.40 resistance breakout. Failure = drop to $8.60.
data.description: The price of AVAX has surged past the $9.40 resistance level with the support of a significant whale holding 72% of the tokens. Analysts are predicting a target price of $9.80 within the next two weeks. However, if the price fails to reach this level, a rapid decline to the $8.60 support level is expected. This development suggests potential volatility in the near future for AVAX investors.

data.title: GIGGLE faces $35 breakdown after failed $49 breakout, bearish momentum suggests sharp drop in 48 hours.
data.description: GIGGLE recently made a unsuccessful push to break out at the $49 mark, resulting in a forceful rejection indicating diminishing buying interest. The bearish momentum suggests a rapid decline towards the $35 support level in the upcoming 48 hours.

data.title: NEAR Protocol's $1.65 target hinges on breaching $1.46 resistance amid whale activity, risking drop to $1.20.
data.description: NEAR Protocol is currently at a crucial stage in trading, with influential investors indicating a potential rise towards $1.65. However, if the resistance at $1.46 is not broken, it could lead to a rapid decline to support levels around $1.20.

data.title: TRON aiming for $0.35 with stablecoin support near $0.33. Potential rise in 7-10 days if key levels are maintained.
data.description: The TRX cryptocurrency is currently trading close to a resistance level of $0.33, with an increase in stablecoin inflows contributing to a stable demand trend. This situation has created a potential opportunity for TRX to reach $0.35 in the next 7-10 days as long as crucial levels are sustained.

data.title: ENA's price surpasses $0.16 in 10 days amid bullish dominance. Derivatives suggest volatile expansion despite warnings.
data.description: Ethena is experiencing a technical breakout, with a target price of $0.16 despite some caution around its momentum. Bulls currently hold a 67% long position dominance, and the derivatives positioning indicates potential for increased volatility ahead.

data.title: SUI could reach $1.10 soon with a neutral RSI of 53.66 and 70% long whale positioning, up from $0.96.
data.description: With a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 53.66, and whales holding 70% long positions, the stage is set for a potential breakout from $0.96 to $1.10 for SUI. Aggressive derivative sellers are contributing to the final anticipatory atmosphere before the anticipated movement.

data.title: Worldcoin's price test at $0.28 sees growing selling pressure and weakening indicators on various timeframes, signaling bearish trend.
data.description: Worldcoin is experiencing increasing selling pressure at $0.28, with key support levels at risk as momentum indicators weaken across various timeframes. This situation suggests potential challenges for Worldcoin, as it grapples with maintaining its value amidst selling pressure.

data.title: Bittensor plunges below $232 support to $180, causing TAO to crash under $200 amid rally downfall. Retail holders face grim situation.
data.description: Bittensor's technical infrastructure has deteriorated, dropping below a crucial support level at $232, leading to a sharp decline towards $180. The momentum of the AI token has now shifted entirely, indicating a reversal in direction. Retail investors are on the verge of witnessing a significant downturn in the token's value.

data.title: ADA faces pivotal moment: $0.30 milestone crucial in next 48 hours. Institutional vs. retail battle - breakout to $0.30 or breakdown to $0.22 imminent.
data.description: Cardano is currently at a crucial point in its trading journey, with institutional investors gathering while retail investors are potentially selling off. The future direction hinges on this balance - if ADA can surpass resistance levels, it may surge to $0.30. However, if support levels falter instead, the price could drop to $0.22. This pivotal moment will decide the immediate path for Cardano in the market.

data.title: Global Sources Hong Kong Shows Phase II Officially Opens, AI Products Go Mainstream as Humanoid Robot Zone Makes Its Debut
data.description: Today marks the inauguration of Phase II of the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows at AsiaWorld-Expo in Hong Kong. The event, running from 18 to 21 April for four days, encompasses four key trade shows: the Mobile Electronics Show, the Smart Home, Security &...

data.title: JinkoSolar Officially Launches "Light Diamond" Lightweight, High-Strength Module
data.description: On April 18, 2026, JinkoSolar, a top global supplier of PV and ESS, introduced a new lightweight module solution tailored for low-load-bearing roofs. Known as the Jinko "Light Diamond," this high-strength module is derived from the Tiger Neo 3.0 series. This innovative product aims to provide a reliable solar energy option for structures with limited load-bearing capacity.
